Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* - Proof that the functor obtained from a multisorted binding signature
  is omega-cocontinuous ([is_omega_cont_MultiSortedSigToFunctor]) *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.Lists.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Graphs.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Coproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.All.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Limits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Colimits.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.HSET.Structures.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.StandardCategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Groupoids.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SumOfSignatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.BinProductOfSignatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSortedBindingSig.
Require UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.SortIndexing.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.MultiSorted_alt.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Chains.OmegaContFunctors.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.ContinuitySignature.GeneralLemmas.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.ContinuitySignature.CommutingOfOmegaLimitsAndCoproducts.


Local Open Scope cat.

Section FixTheContext.

  Context (sort : UU) (Hsort : isofhlevel 3 sort) (C : category)
          (TC : Terminal C) (IC : Initial C)
          (BP : BinProducts C) (BC : BinCoproducts C)
          (* (PC : forall (I : UU), Products I C) *) (eqsetPC : forall (s s' : sort), Products (s=s') C)
          (CC : forall (I : UU), isaset I → Coproducts I C).

  (** Define the discrete category of sorts *)
  Let sort_cat : category := path_pregroupoid sort Hsort.

  (** This represents "sort → C" *)
  Let sortToC : category := SortIndexing.sortToC sort Hsort C.

  Let sortToCC : category := SortIndexing.sortToCC sort Hsort C.
  Let TsortToCC : Terminal sortToCC := SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC.

  Let sortToC2 : category := SortIndexing.sortToC2 sort Hsort C.

  Local Definition BPsortToC2 : BinProducts sortToC2 := SortIndexing.BPsortToC2 sort Hsort _ BP.

  Let projSortToC : sort -> sortToCC := projSortToC sort Hsort C.
  Let hat_functorC : sort -> C ⟶ sortToC := hat_functor sort Hsort C CC.

  Section DefinitionOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
xt: (list sort × sort) × sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort

IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
xt: (list sort × sort) × sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

BP: BinProducts C

sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C

op_f:= option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC si: [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
si: list sort
s, t: sort
op_f:= option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC si: [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
prs:= projSortToC s: sortToCC
[[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]] ⟶ sortToC2

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
si: list sort
s, t: sort
op_f:= option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC si: [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
prs:= projSortToC s: sortToCC
hatt:= hat_functorC t: C ⟶ sortToC
[[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]] ⟶ sortToC2

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
si: list sort
s, t: sort
op_f:= option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC si: [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
prs:= projSortToC s: sortToCC
hatt:= hat_functorC t: C ⟶ sortToC
prshatt:= prs ∙ hatt: [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C] ⟶ sortToC
[[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]] ⟶ sortToC2

    exact (post_comp_functor prshatt).
  Defined.

xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

    (* a := [a1,...,am]
       Each ai := ([si_1, ... si_n],si)
     *)

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2


    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
(λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
  nil
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
∏ (x : list sort × sort)
(xs : list (list sort × sort)),
(λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
  xs
→ (λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
    (cons x xs)

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
(λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
  nil
 exact TT.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
∏ (x : list sort × sort)
(xs : list (list sort × sort)),
(λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
  xs
→ (λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
    (cons x xs)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ _ : list (list sort × sort),
 sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2) ap1
(λ _ : list (list sort × sort), sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
  (cons ap ap1)

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
a: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ _ : list (list sort × sort),
 sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2) ap1
BinProducts sortToC2

      repeat (apply BinProducts_functor_precat) ; exact BP.
  Defined.

(** optimized version that does not introduce the terminal element in the singleton case: *)
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
T:= constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToCC
TT:= T ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t): sortToC2
⟶ [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
HH:= λ ap : list sort × sort,
hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (ap,, t): list sort × sort → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

    exact (foldr1_map (λ F G, BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToC2 F G) TT HH xs).
  Defined.

op: ops sort M
sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2

      exact (hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized (arity sort M op)).
  Defined.

  End DefinitionOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.

  (** * the following is a deviation from the main topic of this file *)
  Section OmegaCocontinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.

    Context (EsortToC2 : Exponentials BPsortToC2) (** this requires exponentials in a higher space than before *)
      (HC : Colims_of_shape nat_graph C).

TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xt: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece xt)

sort: UU

TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2

is_omega_cocont

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xt: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cocont
  (let prs := projSortToC (pr21 xt) in
   let hatt := hat_functorC (pr2 xt) in
   let prshatt := prs ∙ hatt in
   post_comp_functor prshatt)

is_omega_cocont

  (projSortToC (pr21 xt) ∙ hat_functorC (pr2 xt))

TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xt: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_left_adjoint (hat_functorC (pr2 xt))
 apply MultiSorted_alt.is_left_adjoint_hat.
    Defined.

∏ (x : list sort × sort)
(xs : list (list sort × sort)),
(λ xs0 : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs0,, t))) xs
→ (λ xs0 : list (list sort × sort),
   ∏ t : sort,
   is_omega_cocont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
∏ x : sortToC2,
is_omega_cocont
  (constprod_functor1
     (BinProducts_functor_precat
        [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
        [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
        (BinProducts_functor_precat
           (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP)) x)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
is_omega_cocont
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n
        → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2 :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n0
           → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
      with
      | 0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) 0,
          unit_rect (λ _ : unit, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
            (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC
               TsortToCC
             ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t)) xs
      | S n0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S n0),
          BinProduct_of_functors
            (BinProducts_functor_precat
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               (BinProducts_functor_precat
                  (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP))
            (F n0 (pr2 xs))
            (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr1 xs,, t))
      end) (pr1 ap1) (pr22 (cons ap ap1)))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
is_omega_cocont
  (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece
     (pr12 (cons ap ap1),, t))

 ∏ t : sort,

   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1

BinProducts sortToC2
 apply BinProducts_functor_precat, BinProducts_functor_precat, BP.

        (BinProducts_functor_precat
           (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP)) x)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
Exponentials
  (BinProducts_functor_precat
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     (BinProducts_functor_precat
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP))

          apply EsortToC2.
        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
is_omega_cocont
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n
        → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2 :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n0
           → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
      with
      | 0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) 0,
          unit_rect (λ _ : unit, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
            (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC
               TsortToCC
             ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t)) xs
      | S n0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S n0),
          BinProduct_of_functors
            (BinProducts_functor_precat
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               (BinProducts_functor_precat
                  (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP))
            (F n0 (pr2 xs))
            (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr1 xs,, t))
      end) (pr1 ap1) (pr22 (cons ap ap1)))
 apply (ap_func t).
        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category

sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
ap: list sort × sort
ap1: list (list sort × sort)
ap_func: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 ∏ t : sort,
 is_omega_cocont
   (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t))) ap1
t: sort
is_omega_cocont
  (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece
     (pr12 (cons ap ap1),, t))
 apply is_omega_cocont_hat_exp_functor_list'_piece.
    Defined.

IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
EsortToC2: Exponentials BPsortToC2
HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
lt: list sort × sort
F: sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2
Hyp: is_omega_cocont F
is_omega_cocont F

 apply BPsortToC2.

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

HC: Colims_of_shape nat_graph C
M: MultiSortedSig sort
∏ i : ops sort M,
is_omega_cocont
  (hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized (arity sort M i))

      intros op; apply is_omega_cocont_hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized.
    Defined.

  End OmegaCocontinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.

  Section OmegaContinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.

  Context (LC : Lims_of_shape conat_graph C)
          (distr : ∏ I : HSET, ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))).

  (* Should also be split up into multiple definitions/lemmas *)
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
is_omega_cont
  (post_comp_functor (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))

TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C

BC: BinCoproducts C

ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
isLimCone
  (mapdiagram
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
  (post_comp_functor (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)
     L)
  (mapcone
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch con)


    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (mapdiagram
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch) F)
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
  (cone_pointwise
     (mapdiagram
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
     (mapcone
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch con)
     F)

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F) G)
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)


    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F) G)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
is_z_isomorphism
  (limArrow ?CC
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G))

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F) G)
 apply LC. 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
is_z_isomorphism
  (limArrow
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G))


    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
t = G → cochain C
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= ?Goal: t = G → cochain C
is_z_isomorphism
  (limArrow
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G))

  ?pr1

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category

sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort

  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]

G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
p: t = G
(λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
 ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph, edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
  (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
   pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
p: t = G
n, m: vertex conat_graph
q: edge n m
C ⟦ pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s,
pr1 (pr1 (dob coch m) F) s ⟧

        exact (pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s).
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_z_isomorphism
  (limArrow
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G))


    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
C
⟦ lim
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G)),
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (limArrow
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G)) 
  ?g

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
C
⟦ lim
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G)),
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
C
⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
    (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
       (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧

ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort

  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L

F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
∏ a : sortToC, LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)

(λ n : vertex conat_graph,

 intro ; apply ω_complete_functor_cat ; exact LC.

distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]

con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con

G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,

  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)

⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC

  (pr1

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
bla: ∏ a : sortToC,
LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)
bla': ∏ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)
LF_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
  isLimcon F: isLimCone (diagram_pointwise coch F)
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
C
⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
    (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
       (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C

BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
bla: ∏ a : sortToC,
LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)
bla': ∏ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)

  isLimcon F: isLimCone (diagram_pointwise coch F)
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
LFs_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
  (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
  LF_lim s: isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s)
C
⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
    (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
       (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
bla: ∏ a : sortToC,
LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)
bla': ∏ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)
LF_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
  isLimcon F: isLimCone (diagram_pointwise coch F)
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
LFs_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
  (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
  LF_lim s: isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s)
LFs_cone:= make_LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s) LFs_lim: LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
C
⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
    (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
       (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
pr1
  (pr1
     (post_comp_functor
        (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G ⟧


      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
bla: ∏ a : sortToC,
LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)
bla': ∏ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)
LF_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
  isLimcon F: isLimCone (diagram_pointwise coch F)
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
LFs_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
  (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
  LF_lim s: isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s)
LFs_cone:= make_LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s) LFs_lim: LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
∏ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
C
⟦ (λ i0 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i0)))
    i, (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)) i ⟧

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
bla: ∏ a : sortToC,
LimCone (diagram_pointwise coch a)
bla': ∏ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     a)
LF_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
  isLimcon F: isLimCone (diagram_pointwise coch F)
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
LFs_lim:= isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
  (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
  (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
  LF_lim s: isLimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s)
LFs_cone:= make_LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
  (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
     (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
     s) LFs_lim: LimCone
  (diagram_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
i: pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)
C
⟦ (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i))) i,
(λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)) i ⟧


      (* The following proof "justifies" the exact statement *)
      (* assert (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s = x i).
         { apply idpath. } *)

      exact (pr1 (z_iso_inv (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))).
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (limArrow
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))
     (pr1
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
     (cone_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F)
        (pr1
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
        (cone_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch)
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
           (mapcone
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch con) F) G))
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
   · (let bla :=
        λ a : sortToC,
        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
          (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
      let bla' :=
        λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) a) in
      let LF_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
          isLimcon F in
      let LFs_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
          (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
          (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
      let LFs_cone :=
        make_LimCone
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
          (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
          (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
             (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
          LFs_lim in
      CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
        (coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
        (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
           (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
        (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
         pr1
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone
                 (LC (x i)))))))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
   · (let bla :=
        λ a : sortToC,
        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
          (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
      let bla' :=
        λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) a) in
      let LF_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
          isLimcon F in
      let LFs_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
          (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
          (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
      let LFs_cone :=
        make_LimCone
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
          (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
          (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
             (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
          LFs_lim in
      CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
        (coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
        (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
           (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
        (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
         pr1
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone
                 (LC (x i))))))) =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· (let bla :=
     λ a : sortToC,
     ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
       (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
       (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
   let bla' :=
     λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     LC
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
     in
   let LF_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
       isLimcon F in
   let LFs_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
       (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
       (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim
       s in
   let LFs_cone :=
     make_LimCone
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
       (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
       (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
          (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
       LFs_lim in
   CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
· limArrow
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G))
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
    (cone_pointwise
       (diagram_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          F)
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
       (cone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
          (mapcone
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
             con) F) G) =
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G)))

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
