[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
   · (let bla :=
        λ a : sortToC,
        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
          (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
      let bla' :=
        λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) a) in
      let LF_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
          isLimcon F in
      let LFs_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
          (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
          (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
      let LFs_cone :=
        make_LimCone
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
          (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
          (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
             (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
          LFs_lim in
      CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
        (coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
        (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
           (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
        (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
         pr1
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone
                 (LC (x i))))))) =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
   · (let bla :=
        λ a : sortToC,
        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
          (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
      let bla' :=
        λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
        LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) a) in
      let LF_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
          isLimcon F in
      let LFs_lim :=
        isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
          (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
          (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
      let LFs_cone :=
        make_LimCone
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
          (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
          (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
             (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
          LFs_lim in
      CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
        (coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
        (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
           (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
        (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
         pr1
           (z_iso_inv
              (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone
                 (LC (x i))))))) = ?b
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
?b =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· (let bla :=
     λ a : sortToC,
     ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
       (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
       (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
   let bla' :=
     λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     LC
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
     in
   let LF_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
       isLimcon F in
   let LFs_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
       (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
       (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
   let LFs_cone :=
     make_LimCone
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
       (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
       (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
          (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
       LFs_lim in
   CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i)))))) =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
∏ i : t = G,
is_z_isomorphism
  ((λ i0 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
    pr1
      (z_iso_inv
         (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
            (make_LimCone
               (diagram_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
               (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
               (cone_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
               (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                  (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                   LC
                     (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                  (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                  (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch
                     (λ a : sortToC,
                      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                     con isLimcon F) s)) (LC (x i0)))))
     i)
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x) =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        pr1
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ 
                       a : 
                        path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                       LC
                        (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                        coch
                        (λ 
                        a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                        con isLimcon F) s)) 
                (LC (x i))))),,
     CoproductOfArrowsIsos 
       (t = G) C
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        lim (LC (x i)))
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        pr1
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ 
                       a : 
                        path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                       LC
                        (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                        coch
                        (λ 
                        a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                        con isLimcon F) s)) 
                (LC (x i))))) 
       ?Goal0
     :
     z_iso
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
∏ i : t = G,
is_z_isomorphism
  ((λ i0 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
    pr1
      (z_iso_inv
         (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
            (make_LimCone
               (diagram_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
               (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
               (cone_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
               (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                  (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                   LC
                     (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                  (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                  (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch
                     (λ a : sortToC,
                      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                     con isLimcon F) s)) (LC (x i0)))))
     i)
 intro ; apply (pr2 (z_iso_inv _)). 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x) =
identity
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        pr1
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort,
                       LC
                         (diagram_pointwise
                            (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                            a)) (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                         coch
                         (λ a : sortToC,
                          ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                            (path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort)
                            (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                         L con isLimcon F) s))
                (LC (x i))))),,
     CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        lim (LC (x i)))
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
       (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
        pr1
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort,
                       LC
                         (diagram_pointwise
                            (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                            a)) (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                         coch
                         (λ a : sortToC,
                          ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                            (path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort)
                            (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                         L con isLimcon F) s))
                (LC (x i)))))
       (λ i : t = G,
        pr2
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort,
                       LC
                         (diagram_pointwise
                            (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                            a)) (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                         coch
                         (λ a : sortToC,
                          ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                            (path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort)
                            (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                         L con isLimcon F) s))
                (LC (x i)))))
     :
     z_iso
       (coproduct_of_limit C LC
          (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
             (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)
· pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))


        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) =
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso
          (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
             LC
             (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
          (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
          (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
∏ u : vertex conat_graph,
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso
          (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
             LC
             (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
          (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
          (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
· limOut
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G)) u =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) u

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (z_iso_inv
       (make_z_iso
          (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
             LC
             (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
          (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
          (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
· limOut
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G)) n =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n


        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (z_iso_inv
        (make_z_iso
           (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
              LC
              (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                 (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
           (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
           (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
   · limOut
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G)) n) =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (z_iso_inv
        (make_z_iso
           (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
              LC
              (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                 (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
           (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
           (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
   · limOut
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G)) n) = ?b
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
?b =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· (inv_from_z_iso
     (z_iso_inv
        (make_z_iso
           (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C
              LC
              (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
                 (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
           (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
           (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
   · limOut
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G)) n) = ?b

          
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (z_iso_inv
     (make_z_iso
        (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
        (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
        (pr2 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))))
· limOut
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G)) n = ?t2

          apply limArrowCommutes.
        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
