                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· coneOut
    (limit_of_coproduct_as_cone_of_coproduct_to_limit
       C LC
       (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
          (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x) n =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n



        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· coneOut
    (limit_of_coproduct_as_cone_of_coproduct_to_limit
       C LC
       (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
          (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x) n = ?b
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
?b =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))),,
   CoproductOfArrowsIsos (t = G) C
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G), lim (LC (x i)))
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i)))))
     (λ i : t = G,
      pr2
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
· coneOut
    (limit_of_coproduct_as_cone_of_coproduct_to_limit
       C LC
       (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
          (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x) n = ?b
 apply precompWithCoproductArrow. 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
CoproductArrow (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
     (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
  (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
   (λ i0 : t = G,
    pr1
      ((λ i1 : t = G,
        pr2
          (z_iso_inv
             (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
                (make_LimCone
                   (diagram_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                   (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                   (cone_pointwise
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                   (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                      (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                      (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort
                               Hsort,
                       LC (diagram_pointwise ... a))
                      (pr1 L F)
                      (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                      (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                         coch
                         (λ a : sortToC,
                          ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                            ... ...) L con isLimcon F)
                      s)) (LC (x i1))))) i0)) i
   · (λ i0 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      (λ i1 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
       coneOut (limCone (LC (x i1))) n) i0
      · CoproductIn (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
          ((λ n : ℕ,
            CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (λ i1 : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
               dob (x i1) n)) n) i0) i) =
coneOut
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G) n


        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
CoproductArrow (t = G) C
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G) (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (L F) s))
  (λ i : t = G,
   limArrow (LC (x i)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
     (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
        (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
   · (coneOut (limCone (LC (x i))) n
      · CoproductIn (t = G) C
          (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
             (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s))
          i)) =
CoproductOfArrows (t = G) C
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G) (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (L F) s))
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
     (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s))
  (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (coneOut con n) F s)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
CoproductArrow (t = G) C
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G) (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (L F) s))
  (λ i : t = G,
   limArrow (LC (x i)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
     (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
        (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
   · (coneOut (limCone (LC (x i))) n
      · CoproductIn (t = G) C
          (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
             (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s))
          i)) =
CoproductArrow (t = G) C
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G) (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (L F) s))
  (λ i : t = G,
   pr1 (coneOut con n) F s
   · CoproductIn (t = G) C
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s)) i)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
(λ i : t = G,
 limArrow (LC (x i)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
   (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
      (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
 · (coneOut (limCone (LC (x i))) n
    · CoproductIn (t = G) C
        (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
           (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s))
        i)) =
(λ i : t = G,
 pr1 (coneOut con n) F s
 · CoproductIn (t = G) C
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s)) i)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
p: t = G
limArrow (LC (x p)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
· (coneOut (limCone (LC (x p))) n
   · CoproductIn (t = G) C
       (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
          (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)) p) =
pr1 (coneOut con n) F s
· CoproductIn (t = G) C
    (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
       (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s)) p

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
p: t = G
limArrow (LC (x p)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
· coneOut (limCone (LC (x p))) n
· CoproductIn (t = G) C
    (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
       (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)) p =
pr1 (coneOut con n) F s
· CoproductIn (t = G) C
    (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
       (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s)) p

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
n: vertex conat_graph
p: t = G
limArrow (LC (x p)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
· coneOut (limCone (LC (x p))) n =
pr1 (coneOut con n) F s

        apply (Graphs.Limits.limArrowCommutes (LC (x p))).
      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· (let bla :=
     λ a : sortToC,
     ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
       (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
       (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
   let bla' :=
     λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     LC
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
     in
   let LF_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
       isLimcon F in
   let LFs_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
       (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
       (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
   let LFs_cone :=
     make_LimCone
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
       (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
       (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
          (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
       LFs_lim in
   CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
· limArrow
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G))
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
    (cone_pointwise
       (diagram_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          F)
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
       (cone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
          (mapcone
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
             con) F) G) =
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G)))
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· (let bla :=
     λ a : sortToC,
     ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
       (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
       (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
   let bla' :=
     λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
     LC
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
     in
   let LF_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
       isLimcon F in
   let LFs_lim :=
     isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
       (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
       (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
   let LFs_cone :=
     make_LimCone
       (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
       (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
       (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
          (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
       LFs_lim in
   CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
· limArrow
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G))
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
    (cone_pointwise
       (diagram_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          F)
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
       (cone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
          (mapcone
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
             con) F) G) = ?b
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
?b =
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G)))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· ((let bla :=
      λ a : sortToC,
      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
        (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
    let bla' :=
      λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      LC
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           a) in
    let LF_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
        isLimcon F in
    let LFs_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
        (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
        (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
    let LFs_cone :=
      make_LimCone
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           s) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
        (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
        LFs_lim in
    CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
      (coproduct_of_limit C LC
         (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
            (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
      (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
      (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
       pr1
         (z_iso_inv
            (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
   · limArrow
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G))
       (pr1
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          G)
       (cone_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F)
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          (cone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch)
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
             (mapcone
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch con) F) G)) =
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G)))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))) =
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· ((let bla :=
      λ a : sortToC,
      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
        (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
    let bla' :=
      λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      LC
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           a) in
    let LF_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
        isLimcon F in
    let LFs_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
        (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
        (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
    let LFs_cone :=
      make_LimCone
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           s) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
        (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
        LFs_lim in
    CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
      (coproduct_of_limit C LC
         (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
            (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
      (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
      (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
       pr1
         (z_iso_inv
            (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
   · limArrow
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G))
       (pr1
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          G)
       (cone_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F)
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          (cone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch)
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
             (mapcone
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch con) F) G))


        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= ?Goal: is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))) =
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· ((let bla :=
      λ a : sortToC,
      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
        (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
    let bla' :=
      λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      LC
        (diagram_pointwise 
           (diagram_pointwise coch F) a) in
    let LF_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
        isLimcon F in
    let LFs_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
        (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' 
        (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim
        s in
    let LFs_cone :=
      make_LimCone
        (diagram_pointwise 
           (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
        (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
        (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
        LFs_lim in
    CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
      (coproduct_of_limit C LC
         (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
            (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
      (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
      (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
       pr1
         (z_iso_inv
            (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
   · limArrow
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G))
       (pr1
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          G)
       (cone_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F)
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          (cone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch)
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
             (mapcone
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch con) F) G))

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_z_isomorphism (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))

          
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
is_inverse_in_precat
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
  (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x)

          
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
q:= distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x: coproduct_distribute_over_omega_limits C LC
  (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
     (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x
is_inverse_in_precat (pr1 q)
  (coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x)

          split ; apply (pr2 q).
        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
identity
  (lim
     (LC
        (diagram_pointwise
           (diagram_pointwise
              (mapdiagram
                 (post_comp_functor
                    (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                 coch) F) G))) =
pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x)
· ((let bla :=
      λ a : sortToC,
      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
        (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
    let bla' :=
      λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
      LC
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           a) in
    let LF_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
        isLimcon F in
    let LFs_lim :=
      isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
        (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
        (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
    let LFs_cone :=
      make_LimCone
        (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           s) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
        (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
           (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
        LFs_lim in
    CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
      (coproduct_of_limit C LC
         (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
            (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
      (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
      (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
       pr1
         (z_iso_inv
            (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
   · limArrow
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G))
       (pr1
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          G)
       (cone_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F)
          (pr1
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
          (cone_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch)
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
             (mapcone
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch con) F) G))


        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x),, d_i)
· identity
    (lim
       (LC
          (diagram_pointwise
             (diagram_pointwise
                (mapdiagram
                   (post_comp_functor
                      (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                   coch) F) G))) =
(let bla :=
   λ a : sortToC,
   ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
     (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
     (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
 let bla' :=
   λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
   LC (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
   in
 let LF_lim :=
   isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
     isLimcon F in
 let LFs_lim :=
   isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
 let LFs_cone :=
   make_LimCone
     (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
     (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
     (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
        (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
     LFs_lim in
 CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
   (coproduct_of_limit C LC
      (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
         (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
   (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
      (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
   (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
    pr1
      (z_iso_inv
         (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
· limArrow
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G))
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
    (cone_pointwise
       (diagram_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          F)
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
       (cone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
          (mapcone
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
             con) F) G)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
inv_from_z_iso
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x),, d_i) =
(let bla :=
   λ a : sortToC,
   ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
     (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
     (diagram_pointwise coch a) in
 let bla' :=
   λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
   LC (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) a)
   in
 let LF_lim :=
   isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch bla L con
     isLimcon F in
 let LFs_lim :=
   isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
     (diagram_pointwise coch F) bla' (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) LF_lim s in
 let LFs_cone :=
   make_LimCone
     (diagram_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
     (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
     (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F)
        (pr1 L F) (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
     LFs_lim in
 CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
   (coproduct_of_limit C LC
      (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
         (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
   (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
      (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
   (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
    pr1
      (z_iso_inv
         (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim LFs_cone (LC (x i))))))
· limArrow
    (LC
       (diagram_pointwise
          (diagram_pointwise
             (mapdiagram
                (post_comp_functor
                   (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
                coch) F) G))
    (pr1
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
    (cone_pointwise
       (diagram_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          F)
       (pr1
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
       (cone_pointwise
          (mapdiagram
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
          (post_comp_functor
             (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
          (mapcone
             (post_comp_functor
                (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
             con) F) G)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
(λ f : C
       ⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
       CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  (CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
inv_from_z_iso
  (CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ 
                        a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                       con isLimcon F) s)) 
              (LC (x i))))),, 
   ?pr2
   :
   z_iso
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x),, d_i) =
limArrow
  (LC
     (diagram_pointwise
        (diagram_pointwise
           (mapdiagram
              (post_comp_functor
                 (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t))
              coch) F) G))
  (pr1
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F) G)
  (cone_pointwise
     (diagram_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        F)
     (pr1
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L) F)
     (cone_pointwise
        (mapdiagram
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch)
        (post_comp_functor
           (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t) L)
        (mapcone
           (post_comp_functor
              (projSortToC s ∙ hat_functorC t)) coch
           con) F) G)

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
(λ f : C
       ⟦ coproduct_of_limit C LC
           (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
              (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x,
       CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
         (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)) ⟧,
 is_z_isomorphism f)
  (CoproductOfArrows (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)) C
     (coproduct_of_limit C LC
        (CC (pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))
           (pr2 ((t = G),, Hsort t G))) x)
     (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
        (λ _ : t = G, projSortToC s (L F)))
     (λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
      pr1
        (z_iso_inv
           (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
              (make_LimCone
                 (diagram_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
                 (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
                 (cone_pointwise
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
                 (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                    (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                    (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                     LC
                       (diagram_pointwise
                          (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                    (pr1 L F)
                    (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                    (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                       coch
                       (λ a : sortToC,
                        ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                          (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                          (diagram_pointwise coch a))
                       L con isLimcon F) s))
              (LC (x i))))))

          
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
i: pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G)
is_z_isomorphism
  ((λ i : pr1 ((t = G),, Hsort t G),
    pr1
      (z_iso_inv
         (z_iso_from_lim_to_lim
            (make_LimCone
               (diagram_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) s)
               (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
               (cone_pointwise
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
               (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim
                  (diagram_pointwise coch F)
                  (λ a : path_pregroupoid sort Hsort,
                   LC
                     (diagram_pointwise
                        (diagram_pointwise coch F) a))
                  (pr1 L F)
                  (cone_pointwise coch L con F)
                  (isLimFunctor_is_pointwise_Lim coch
                     (λ a : sortToC,
                      ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
                        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort)
                        (diagram_pointwise coch a)) L
                     con isLimcon F) s)) (LC (x i)))))
     i)

          apply is_z_iso_inv_from_z_iso.
        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
