x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
n: vertex conat_graph
p: t = G
limArrow (LC (x p)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
· coneOut (limCone (LC (x p))) n
· CoproductIn (t = G) C
    (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
       (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)) p =
pr1 (coneOut con n) F s
· CoproductIn (t = G) C
    (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)
       (λ _ : t = G, pr1 (dob coch n F) s)) p

        
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
s, t: sort
coch: cochain
  [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
L: [sortToC, [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]
con: cone coch L
isLimcon: isLimCone coch L con
F: sortToC
G: path_pregroupoid sort Hsort
x:= λ _ : t = G,
(λ n : vertex conat_graph,
 pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s),,
((λ (n m : vertex conat_graph) 
  (q : edge n m), pr1 (pr1 (dmor coch q) F) s)
 :
 (λ f : vertex conat_graph → C,
  ∏ a b : vertex conat_graph,
  edge a b → C ⟦ f a, f b ⟧)
   (λ n : vertex conat_graph,
    pr1 (pr1 (dob coch n) F) s)): t = G → cochain C
d_i:= coproduct_of_limit_to_limit_of_coproduct C LC
  (CC (t = G) (Hsort t G)) x,,
(let q := distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x in
 (let X := pr22 q in X),, (let X := pr12 q in X)): is_z_isomorphism
  (pr1 (distr ((t = G),, Hsort t G) x))
n: vertex conat_graph
p: t = G
limArrow (LC (x p)) (pr1 (pr1 L F) s)
  (cone_pointwise (diagram_pointwise coch F) (pr1 L F)
     (cone_pointwise coch L con F) s)
· coneOut (limCone (LC (x p))) n =
pr1 (coneOut con n) F s

        apply (Graphs.Limits.limArrowCommutes (LC (x p))).
  Defined.

  (* In case no constructors were given, i.e. just H := Id. *)
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont
  (pre_comp_functor
     (option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC (pr11 xst)))

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont
  (pre_comp_functor
     (option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC (pr11 xst)))

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
Lims_of_shape conat_graph sortToC

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
d: cochain sortToC
LimCone d

    apply ω_complete_functor_cat ; exact LC.
  Defined.

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece xst)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece xst)

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont
  (pre_comp_functor
     (option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC (pr11 xst)))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont
  (let prs := projSortToC (pr21 xst) in
   let hatt := hat_functorC (pr2 xst) in
   let prshatt := prs ∙ hatt in
   post_comp_functor prshatt)

  (pre_comp_functor
     (option_list sort Hsort C TC BC CC (pr11 xst)))
 exact (pre_comp_option_list_omega_cont xst).

→ (λ xs0 : list (list sort × sort),
   is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
is_omega_cont
  (constant_functor sortToC2
     [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
     (post_comp_functor (hat_functorC (pr2 (nil,, t)))
        TsortToCC))

      apply is_omega_cont_constant_functor.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC

distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
∏ (x : list sort × sort)
(xs : list (list sort × sort)),
(λ xs0 : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs0,, t))) xs
→ (λ xs0 : list (list sort × sort),
   is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs0,, t)))
    (cons x xs)
 
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
x: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
IHn: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  xs
(λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  (cons x xs)

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
x: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
IHn: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  xs
is_omega_cont
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n
        → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2 :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n0
           → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
      with
      | 0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) 0,
          unit_rect (λ _ : unit, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
            (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC
               TsortToCC
             ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t)) xs
      | S n0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S n0),
          BinProduct_of_functors
            (BinProducts_functor_precat
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               (BinProducts_functor_precat
                  (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP))
            (F n0 (pr2 xs))
            (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr1 xs,, t))
      end) (pr1 xs) (pr22 (cons x xs)))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
x: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
IHn: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  xs
is_omega_cont
  (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr12 (cons x xs),, t))

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C

sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category

hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
x: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
IHn: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  xs
is_omega_cont
  ((fix F (n : ℕ) :
        Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n
        → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2 :=
      match
        n as n0
        return
          (Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) n0
           → sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
      with
      | 0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) 0,
          unit_rect (λ _ : unit, sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2)
            (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC
               TsortToCC
             ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t)) xs
      | S n0 =>
          λ xs : Vectors.vec (list sort × sort) (S n0),
          BinProduct_of_functors
            (BinProducts_functor_precat
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
               (BinProducts_functor_precat
                  (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C BP))
            (F n0 (pr2 xs))
            (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr1 xs,, t))
      end) (pr1 xs) (pr22 (cons x xs)))
 apply IHn.
      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
t: sort
x: list sort × sort
xs: list (list sort × sort)
IHn: (λ xs : list (list sort × sort),
 is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list' (xs,, t)))
  xs
is_omega_cont
  (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (pr12 (cons x xs),, t))
 apply is_omega_cont_hat_exp_functor_list'_piece.
  Defined.

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xst: list (list sort × sort) × sort
is_omega_cont (hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized xst)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC

distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
is_omega_cont
  (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC
   ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t))

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC

LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
∏ (a : list sort × sort) 
(res : sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2),
is_omega_cont res
→ is_omega_cont
    (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToC2
       (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (a,, t)) res)

Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category

  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))

t: sort
nat_z_iso ?F
  (constant_functor sortToC2 sortToCC TsortToCC
   ∙ post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t))

      
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
xs: list (list sort × sort)
t: sort
is_omega_cont
  (constant_functor sortToC2
     [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], sortToC]
     (post_comp_functor (hat_functorC t) TsortToCC))

      apply is_omega_cont_constant_functor.

  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))

t: sort
∏ (a : list sort × sort) (res : sortToC2 ⟶ sortToC2),

→ is_omega_cont
    (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToC2
       (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (a,, t)) res)

is_omega_cont
  (BinProduct_of_functors BPsortToC2
     (hat_exp_functor_list'_piece (lt,, t)) F)

 exact Hyp.
  Defined.

  (** The functor obtained from a multisorted binding signature is omega-continuous *)
  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cont (MultiSortedSigToFunctor' M)

  
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
is_omega_cont (MultiSortedSigToFunctor' M)

sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts sortToC2
  (ops sort M) ?ω_lim
  (Coproducts_functor_precat 
     (ops sort M) [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     (Coproducts_functor_precat 
        (ops sort M) (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C
        (CC (ops sort M) (setproperty (ops sort M)))))
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
∏ i : pr1 (ops sort M),
is_omega_cont
  ((λ op : ops sort M,
    hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized (arity sort M op))
     i)

    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
Lims_of_shape conat_graph sortToC2
 do 2 apply ω_complete_functor_cat ; exact LC.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts sortToC2
  (ops sort M)
  (ω_complete_functor_cat
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     (ω_complete_functor_cat C LC
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort))
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C])
  (Coproducts_functor_precat (ops sort M)
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]
     (Coproducts_functor_precat (ops sort M)
        (path_pregroupoid sort Hsort) C
        (CC (ops sort M) (setproperty (ops sort M)))))
 do 2 apply functor_category_ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts ; apply distr.
    
sort: UU
Hsort: isofhlevel 3 sort
C: category
TC: Terminal C
IC: Initial C
BP: BinProducts C
BC: BinCoproducts C
eqsetPC: ∏ s s' : sort, Products (s = s') C
CC: ∏ I : UU, isaset I → Coproducts I C
sort_cat:= path_pregroupoid sort Hsort: category
sortToC:= [path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]: category
sortToCC:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C], C]: category
TsortToCC:= SortIndexing.TsortToCC sort Hsort C TC: Terminal sortToCC
sortToC2:= [[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C],
[path_pregroupoid sort Hsort, C]]: category
projSortToC:= MultiSorted_alt.projSortToC sort Hsort C: sort → sortToCC
hat_functorC:= hat_functor sort Hsort C CC: sort → C ⟶ sortToC
LC: Lims_of_shape conat_graph C
distr: ∏ I : SET,
ω_limits_distribute_over_I_coproducts C I LC
  (CC (pr1 I) (pr2 I))
M: MultiSortedSig sort
∏ i : pr1 (ops sort M),
is_omega_cont
  ((λ op : ops sort M,
    hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized (arity sort M op))
     i)
 intro ; apply is_omega_cont_hat_exp_functor_list'_optimized.
  Defined.

  End OmegaContinuityOfMultiSortedSigToFunctorPrime.


End FixTheContext.
